title: Rich Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting lamb stew made with tender lamb, rich flavors, and a hint of Irish spice. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Guinness, beef broth, tomato paste, thyme, rosemary, salt, and pepper to the pot.
Return the lamb to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
